name: kylas-playwright-framework
description: Enterprise-grade Playwright automation framework for Kylas Sales CRM
author: akashrn1801

scripts.test:leads: playwright test tests/ui/leads/ --project=chromium && npm run notify
scripts.test:rbac: playwright test tests/rbac/ --project=chromium && npm run notify
scripts.test:login: playwright test tests/ui/dashboard/ --project=chromium && npm run notify
scripts.test:deals: playwright test tests/ui/deals/ tests/rbac/deals.rbac.spec.ts --project=chromium && npm run notify
scripts.test:tasks: playwright test tests/ui/tasks/ tests/rbac/tasks.rbac.spec.ts --project=chromium && npm run notify
scripts.report:allure: npm run report:allure:generate && npm run report:allure:open
scripts.posttest: if [ -z "$CI" ]; then npm run notify; fi
scripts.test:contacts: playwright test tests/ui/contacts/ tests/rbac/contacts.rbac.spec.ts --project=chromium && npm run notify
scripts.test:companies: playwright test tests/ui/companies/ tests/rbac/companies.rbac.spec.ts --project=chromium && npm run notify
scripts.test:meetings: playwright test tests/ui/meetings/ tests/rbac/meetings.rbac.spec.ts --project=chromium && npm run notify
scripts.test:quotations: playwright test tests/ui/quotations/ --project=chromium && npm run notify
scripts.test:quotations:rbac: playwright test tests/rbac/quotations.rbac.spec.ts --project=chromium && npm run notify
